notes: Added New Format \u2014 a full alternate look for the app, toggled from Settings (or the small layout icon on the Transactions tab): circular neutral avatars instead of colour-coded category tiles, hairline dividers instead of boxed rows, and an account label under each amount, applied to Overview, Upcoming, Recurring (Income/Bills/Expenses/Transfers), and Transactions.
New Format also moves primary navigation from the bottom bar to a top tab strip, with the quick-add button always in the bottom-right corner instead of embedded in the nav bar.
Portfolio holdings keep their existing card layout in both formats for now \u2014 they carry price/refresh/market details a simple transaction row can't show without losing functionality.
